projects.title: Semantic Retrieval-Based Biomedical Literature Indexing System for PubMed
projects.intro: This project develops a semantic retrieval system for biomedical research papers from PubMed, aiming to achieve precise semantic matching and efficient large-scale retrieval. A total of 1,336,133 papers are included, each segmented into 2,000-character chunks to enable fine-grained semantic indexing. The system ultimately generates 23,715,917 searchable nodes (chunks), providing a robust data foundation for advanced semantic retrieval and scientific question answering.
